description: India Book III,2: Memorandum from Yosef b. Avraham, Aden, to Avraham Ibn Yiju, Mangaluru, India, ca. 1134–37. The document contains various orders for copper vessels, including a tālam (r11), a Malayalam loanword indicating a type of platter, on which see Lambourn, “Borrowed Words in an Ocean of Objects.” Verso contains IB III,28a (PGPID 5504).
tags: 12th c, memorandum, informal note, IB3, India
description_he: ספר הודו III,2: תזכיר מיוסף בן אברהם, מעדן, לאברהם אבן יג'ו במנגלור, הודו, כ-1134-37
